detail.description: Alex Call singles on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Mookie Betts scores.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to second baseman Oswald Peraza.
Alex Call singles on a fly ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Mookie Betts scores. Kyle Tucker scores.
Alex Call doubles (5) on a line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Alex Call to 3rd. Alex Call advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Adolis García.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to center fielder Justin Crawford. Will Smith scores. Miguel Rojas to 2nd.
Alex Call singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Troy Johnston. Hyeseong Kim scores. Will Smith out at home on the throw, left fielder Troy Johnston to catcher Hunter Goodman.
Alex Call singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Max Muncy scores. Teoscar Hernández scores. Alex Call to 2nd.
Alex Call doubles (4) on a line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón.
Alex Call singles on a pop up to second baseman Xavier Edwards. Max Muncy scores.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to right fielder Owen Caissie.
Alex Call singles on a line drive to center fielder Evan Carter.
Alex Call doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Alex Call singles on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Alex Call doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder James Wood.
Alex Call singles on a fly ball to left fielder Daylen Lile. Andy Pages scores.
Alex Call homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to second baseman Luke Keaschall.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kody Clemens. Mookie Betts to 2nd.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Alex Call singles on a line drive to left fielder Jordan Beck. Shohei Ohtani to 2nd.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jake McCarthy.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jose Siri. Andy Pages scores. Max Muncy scores. Teoscar Hernández to 2nd.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to left fielder José Fermín. Andy Pages scores.
Alex Call singles on a line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh.

Alex Call singles on a ground ball to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Kyle Tucker to 2nd.
Alex Call singles on a ground ball to right fielder Braden Montgomery.
